tasks.title: data/AppDatabase.kt — Room migration 12→13 + bridge_trust entity + DAO
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/001-tofu-bundle-v2/{requirements.md, design.md, contracts/schemas/bridge-trust-entry.json}. SECOND: implement the Room schema delta — REQ-010 (table columns + types per design.md), REQ-012 (migration 12→13 atomic + block imports while running per Constitution Article XIII single-migration-per-version). Add BridgeTrustEntity, BridgeTrustDao (with the contract methods getByHash, insert, updatePubkey, touchLastSeen, listAll). Wire into AppDatabase entities list. Update DB version constant. Migration MUST be Kotlin-test-runnable (Room migration test harness).

tasks.title: crypto/KeyBundleImporter.kt — v1+v2 codec + Ed25519 verify + TOFU + ImportResult sealed class
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/001-tofu-bundle-v2/{requirements.md, design.md, contracts/schemas/key-bundle-v2.json, acceptance/tofu-pin.feature}. SECOND: implement the importer end-to-end — REQ-001 (URI parse), REQ-002 (Ed25519 signature verify covering bytes 0..53 + 118..end), REQ-003 (first-pin → NEW_TRUSTED + insert row), REQ-004 (matching pubkey → EXISTING_TRUSTED), REQ-005 (mismatched pubkey → KeyMismatch, do NOT apply), REQ-006 (bad sig → InvalidSignature), REQ-007 (malformed → Malformed with reason), REQ-008 (v1 → UNVERIFIED_V1 + apply), REQ-009 (acceptRepinForBridgeHash → update pubkey + apply + REPINNED_AFTER_MISMATCH), REQ-011 (sealed class with exactly 4 variants), REQ-013 (java.util.Base64 — Constitution Article VI), REQ-014 (per-channel AES keys applied to channel-keys storage), REQ-015 (touch last_seen_at on EXISTING_TRUSTED), REQ-016 (binary wire format exact byte layout), REQ-017 (constructor takes DAO interfaces, no Context). Ed25519 verification MUST pass "BC" explicitly to Signature.getInstance per Constitution Article III. Tests: 11 unit-test cases covering every REQ-NNN row plus the negative paths in the feature file.
